title: Eating Animation
description: A mod that adds sprite animations for edible and drinkable items.
body:
**<center><font size="4">1.21.4 and higher you can use resourcepack 
[--> Theone's Eating Animation Pack <--](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/theones-eating-animation-pack)</center>**

Mod works in a single player :
-
![sin](https://i.imgur.com/pA3iI8d.gif)

And in multiplayer! :
-
![mult](https://i.imgur.com/lUafo7V.gif)



- **For mod support to work, you need to enable the resourcepack**
*(resourcepack already built into minecraft)*
![supguid](https://i.imgur.com/mkXq5GI.png)

**Supported mods list:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Food +

- Winterly

- Farmer's Delight

- Botania

- Hybrid Aquatic

- The Bumblezone

- Additional Additions

- Adorn

- BetterEnd

- BetterNether

- Create

- Duckling

- Expanded Delight

- Naturalist

- Snow Pig

</details>

**[My resource pack supports the Eating Animation Mod](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/theones-items-pack)**
**<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VB-fj2ITVYQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>**

**How to animate custom model data**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0Ico2DYjiVY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


![wik](https://i.imgur.com/QRjSa1h.png)

**Forge Port** [EatingAnimation [Forge]](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animations)
